'''âl-j-m-l''' ('''kalajmeloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wallpaper|wallpaper]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-j-m-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wallpaper|wallpaper]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-j-m-l
|-
! Lemma
| kalajmeloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilajmeloko|thilajmeloko]] || [[word:jilajmeloko|jilajmeloko]] || [[word:shilajmeloko|shilajmeloko]] || [[word:kilajmeloko|kilajmeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulajmeloko|thuthulajmeloko]] || [[word:jujulajmeloko|jujulajmeloko]] || [[word:shushulajmeloko|shushulajmeloko]] || [[word:kukulajmeloko|kukulajmeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulajmeloko|thulajmeloko]] || [[word:julajmeloko|julajmeloko]] || [[word:shulajmeloko|shulajmeloko]] || [[word:kulajmeloko|kulajmeloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholajmeloko|tholajmeloko]] || [[word:jolajmeloko|jolajmeloko]] || [[word:sholajmeloko|sholajmeloko]] || [[word:kolajmeloko|kolajmeloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholajmeloko|tholajmeloko]] || [[word:jolajmeloko|jolajmeloko]] || [[word:sholajmeloko|sholajmeloko]] || [[word:kolajmeloko|kolajmeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlajmeloko|thĂŠlajmeloko]] || [[word:jĂŠlajmeloko|jĂŠlajmeloko]] || [[word:shĂŠlajmeloko|shĂŠlajmeloko]] || [[word:kĂŠlajmeloko|kĂŠlajmeloko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalajmeloko|thalajmeloko]] || [[word:jalajmeloko|jalajmeloko]] || [[word:shalajmeloko|shalajmeloko]] || [[word:kalajmeloko|kalajmeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalajmeloko|thalajmeloko]] || [[word:jalajmeloko|jalajmeloko]] || [[word:shalajmeloko|shalajmeloko]] || [[word:kalajmeloko|kalajmeloko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
